q1.question: What is Work in Korea?
q1.answer: Work in Korea is a job platform for foreign workers in Korea. It offers features like job search, resume building, and self-assessment.

q2.question: How do I sign up?
q2.answer: Click the icon at the top to select your member type (Individual/Company) and sign up with your email.

q3.question: How do I apply for a job posting?
q3.answer: After logging in, you can select a resume and apply on the job posting detail page.

q4.question: How do I post a job as a company member?
q4.answer: After signing up as a company member, you can post jobs from the company dashboard.

q5.question: What should I do if I encounter a problem?
q5.answer: Please contact our support team at support@workinkorea.com and we will help you promptly.
